use_cases: Primary action buttons in SaaS dashboards and web applications
Form submission triggers with loading state feedback
Icon-only buttons for compact UI elements like toolbars
Multi-variant button systems supporting error, warning, and success states
Responsive button components with size and shape customization
ai_summary: A versatile React button component from shugar with extensive customization options including 5 types (primary, secondary, tertiary, error, warning), 4 sizes, and 3 shapes. Features loading state with spinner integration, prefix/suffix icon slots, shadow effects, and full-width layout support. Dark-themed minimalist design with hover interactions, suitable for SaaS, fintech, and developer tool interfaces requiring consistent button styling.
